The river of prose flows on and on without a single chapter heading to break its steady current, paragraph after paragraph carrying the patient reader downstream through the long afternoon of the narrative, past quiet banks and under old stone bridges, never once pausing to announce a number or a name.

The river of prose flows on and on without a single chapter heading to break its steady current, paragraph after paragraph carrying the patient reader downstream through the long afternoon of the narrative, past quiet banks and under old stone bridges, never once pausing to announce a number or a name.
